## Proposed Skill Name

`<kebab-case-name>` (≤ 64 chars, will also be the directory name)

<!-- What recurring AI-app-dev task does this Skill automate or de-risk? -->

2.

1. Step 1 …
2. Step 2 …
3. Step 3 …

- [ ] Write
- [ ] Edit

- [ ] WebFetch / WebSearch
- [ ] Other:

## Supporting Assets

- [ ] Helper scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Reference docs (`references/`)
- [ ] Templates (`templates/`)
- [ ] Examples (`examples/`)
